status..validate: newData.isString() && (newData.val() == 'waiting' || newData.val() == 'playing' || newData.val() == 'finished') && (!data.exists() || newData.val() == data.val() || (data.val() == 'waiting' && newData.val() == 'playing' && (auth.uid == root.child('game_sessions').child($gameId).child('baseWordPickerUid').val() || (!root.child('game_sessions').child($gameId).child('baseWordPickerUid').exists() && (auth.uid == root.child('game_sessions').child($gameId).child('organizerId').val() || auth.uid == root.child('game_sessions').child($gameId).child('baseWordPickerOrder').child(root.child('game_sessions').child($gameId).child('baseWordRound').val() + '').val())))) || (data.val() == 'playing' && newData.val() == 'finished' && root.child('game_sessions').child($gameId).child('players').child(auth.uid).exists()) || (data.val() == 'finished' && newData.val() == 'waiting' && root.child('game_sessions').child($gameId).child('players').child(auth.uid).exists()))

$gameId..write: auth != null && root.child('game_sessions').child($gameId).child('status').val() == 'waiting' && ((!newData.exists() && (root.child('game_sessions').child($gameId).child('organizerId').val() === auth.uid || (data.exists() && root.child('game_sessions').child($gameId).child('players').child(auth.uid).exists()))) || (newData.exists() && root.child('game_sessions').child($gameId).child('isPublic').val() === true && (root.child('game_sessions').child($gameId).child('organizerId').val() === auth.uid || (data.exists() && root.child('game_sessions').child($gameId).child('players').child(auth.uid).exists() && newData.child('baseWord').val() === data.child('baseWord').val() && newData.child('baseWordNorm').val() === data.child('baseWordNorm').val() && newData.child('maxPlayers').val() === data.child('maxPlayers').val() && newData.child('publishedAt').val() === data.child('publishedAt').val() && newData.child('expiresAt').val() === data.child('expiresAt').val()))))
